features.title: Session Login UI
features.description: Add a compact login page and form that authenticate through the existing POST /api/v1/auth/login endpoint and existing keplar_session cookie flow.
acceptance_criteria: Successful login posts to /api/v1/auth/login with method POST and credentials include.
Successful login calls router.refresh() and router.push("/goal-spaces").
Failed API login renders envelope.error.message and does not push.
Thrown or network error renders Unable to sign in.
Form labels are accessible as Email and Password and idle submit text is Sign in.
The /login page redirects a valid keplar_session to /goal-spaces.
The /login page renders a compact design-system-compliant page for anonymous users.
No hardcoded hex colors are introduced.
test_needs: React Testing Library coverage for successful login routing
React Testing Library coverage for API error rendering
Typecheck, lint, format check, and git diff whitespace check
definition_of_done: Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
